since_last: 65% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +4.84%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 65% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.28% · BTC +2.47% · Gold +1.83% · Nasdaq100 -0.92%. 65% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +4.84%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +4.84%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.35%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +10.48%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +10.48%, APP +10.26%, META +9.93%, PATH +8.69%, PLTR +8.63%. Laggards: KLAC -10.26%, TER -9.46%, LRCX -9.10%, AMAT -8.83%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -7.12% at $158.7
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -7.12% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
